song_details.name: Namo Namo Raghukula Nayaka
song_details.arohanam: S R3 G3 M1 P D3 N3 S ||

content.swara: namO namO raghu kula nAyaka divija vandya  namO namO Sankara nagaja nuta ||
namO namO raghu kula nAyaka divija vandya namO namO Sankara nagaja nuta ||
content.sahitya: Salutations (“namO namO”) to the hero (“nAyaka”) of the Raghu dynasty (“raghu kula”)

content.swara: ahalya SApa mOchana asura kula bhanjana sahaja viswAmitra savana rakshaka ||
taraNi tanoojAdi taru chara pAlaka Saradhi langhana kruta soumitri samEta ||
nirupama Sri venkaTa nilaya nija nagara pura vihAra punDarikAksha ||
content.sahitya: In this song Annamacharya prays to Lord Rama narrating his great deeds of punishing the wicked and

content.swara: ahalya SApa mOchana asura kula bhanjana sahaja viswAmitra savana rakshaka ||
content.sahitya: He is the protector (“pAlaka”) of Dharma  (“vihita dharma”).
